'''bojawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoaeal|zoaeal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoaeal|zoaeal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bojawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bojawithi|bojawithi]] || [[word:bojawiji|bojawiji]] || [[word:bojawishi|bojawishi]] || [[word:bojawiki|bojawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bojawuthuthu|bojawuthuthu]] || [[word:bojawujuju|bojawujuju]] || [[word:bojawushushu|bojawushushu]] || [[word:bojawukuku|bojawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bojawuthu|bojawuthu]] || [[word:bojawuju|bojawuju]] || [[word:bojawushu|bojawushu]] || [[word:bojawuku|bojawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bojawufthuf|bojawufthuf]] || [[word:bojawufjuf|bojawufjuf]] || [[word:bojawufshuf|bojawufshuf]] || [[word:bojawufkuf|bojawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bojawethe|bojawethe]] || [[word:bojaweje|bojaweje]] || [[word:bojaweshe|bojaweshe]] || [[word:bojaweke|bojaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bojawothotho|bojawothotho]] || [[word:bojawojojo|bojawojojo]] || [[word:bojawoshosho|bojawoshosho]] || [[word:bojawokoko|bojawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bojawotho|bojawotho]] || [[word:bojawojo|bojawojo]] || [[word:bojawosho|bojawosho]] || [[word:bojawoko|bojawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bojawofthof|bojawofthof]] || [[word:bojawofjof|bojawofjof]] || [[word:bojawofshof|bojawofshof]] || [[word:bojawofkof|bojawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfthÃŸf|bojawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfjÃŸf|bojawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfshÃŸf|bojawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfkÃŸf|bojawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bojawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bojawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bojawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bojawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfthÃŸf|bojawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfjÃŸf|bojawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfshÃŸf|bojawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfkÃŸf|bojawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfthÃŸf|bojawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfjÃŸf|bojawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfshÃŸf|bojawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bojawÃŸfkÃŸf|bojawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bojawÃḊthÃḊ|bojawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bojawÃḊjÃḊ|bojawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bojawÃḊshÃḊ|bojawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bojawÃḊkÃḊ|bojawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bojawathatha|bojawathatha]] || [[word:bojawajaja|bojawajaja]] || [[word:bojawashasha|bojawashasha]] || [[word:bojawakaka|bojawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bojawatha|bojawatha]] || [[word:bojawaja|bojawaja]] || [[word:bojawasha|bojawasha]] || [[word:bojawaka|bojawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bojawafthaf|bojawafthaf]] || [[word:bojawafjaf|bojawafjaf]] || [[word:bojawafshaf|bojawafshaf]] || [[word:bojawafkaf|bojawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bojawasha|bojawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bojawshÃḋsha|bojawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bojawrosha|bojawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bojawmusha|bojawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bojawyasha|bojawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobojawnkshÃḋsha|gobojawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobojawnkrosha|gobojawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobojawnkmusha|gobojawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobojawnkyasha|gobojawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bojajawasha|bojajawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bojajawshÃḋsha|bojajawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bojajawrosha|bojajawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bojajawmusha|bojajawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bojajawyasha|bojajawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobojajawnkshÃḋsha|gobojajawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobojajawnkrosha|gobojajawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobojajawnkmusha|gobojajawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobojajawnkyasha|gobojajawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bejÃḊwasha|bejÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bejÃḊwshÃḋsha|bejÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bejÃḊwrosha|bejÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bejÃḊwmusha|bejÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bejÃḊwyasha|bejÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobejÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gobejÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobejÃḊwnkrosha|gobejÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobejÃḊwnkmusha|gobejÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobejÃḊwnkyasha|gobejÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bojfawasha|bojfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bojfawshÃḋsha|bojfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bojfawrosha|bojfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bojfawmusha|bojfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bojfawyasha|bojfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobojfawnkshÃḋsha|gobojfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobojfawnkrosha|gobojfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobojfawnkmusha|gobojfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobojfawnkyasha|gobojfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
